reviews.review_description: game is very beatiful. have basic mechanical,  playing easy. if like shooting game. try this game.
Graphics are great and shooting experience is by far the best feeling. Even though it is a short game trying to pass my previous high score is very entertaining.

I overpaid for this but not by much. It's a keeper.
The cut outs have that beautiful 70s look and thus this app could be thought of as a baby sibling to Gun Club.
The Western level have gunshot sounds that must have been lifted from Sergio Leon's sgaghetti westerns.
The maze level have cut outs from the 70s, hard core 70s and has that delightfully tacky look that makes one think that this level is a result of Nintendo GBA's Pinball Tycoon and a VR shooter got together had unsafe sex and had a baby.
The other 3 levels are forest, military and shooting range. There are the more traditional shooting range targets that swivel from 90degrees to 180, something that Gun Club cut outs don't do. Who cares?
The levels last at least a full minute and are replayable. 
Range Day characters look wispy compared to the cocaine 70s graphics of Gun Club and Dynamic Shooting cut outs and levels last ten seconds if that. Gun handling and loading is cumbersome in Range Day. 
Dynamic Shooting, one walks up to the table and uses the round holsters to pick up the guns. Look ma, no hands and simply drops or even just waves the guns near the holsters to reload. None of the weird reload of Range Day. 
I'm glad I got this. I'm already in love with the 70s comics cut outs of this game which reminds me of cut outs of the Beatles wearing Sergeant Pepper uniforms. I'm looking forward to the coming soon levels that this app promises. 
Promises promises. As thin as a promise. As thin as a shooting range cut out. 
A lot of apps are released half finished with upcoming updates never coming to realization because a lot of apps are fronts for money laundering schemes as quality control on meta quest isn't as good as it is on Google Android tablets. Hopefully this is not the case with Dynamic Shooting.
I like to give us a review, but it loads and when you start it does not work. Hope you can fix tduke￼

This game offers a truly fantastic VR shooting experience! The graphics and design are amazing, with every detail meticulously crafted. The controls are very smooth, and the feeling of aiming is excellent. Additionally, the in-game sound effects and music enrich the experience even further. I definitely recommend it!

This game has so much potential! I think it's ok to say one of the most realistic shooting feel I had in a VR game so far. I also like the graphic style. Can't wait to see new levels and I would definitely like to see a party mode to have fun with friends when we gather at my home.

Die Grafiken sind in Ordnung, die verschiedenen Waffen fühlen sich alle gut und unterschiedlich an. Man kann auch auf viele Dinge schießen, die entsprechend darauf "reagieren" (z.B. Loch in die Dose schießen und Milch kommt raus usw. ). Man kann sich zwar nicht frei bewegen, aber das passt zum Spielkonzept. Die Schwierigkeit ist zwischen sehr einfach und einfach. Der größte Nachteil ist jedoch die Spielzeit - in 10 Minuten (!) ist man mit allen Levels fertig. Mehr gibt es nicht. Eigentlich eine solide Basis auf der man aufbauen könnte, aber seit Start keinerlei Updates, sondern immer noch eine "Coming Soon" Sektion im Spiel! Wäre eine perfekte kostenlose Demo, aber kein Spiel was man verkaufen sollte.

developer_response.body: An update is on the way. Thank you for the detailed review.

reviews.review_description: A VR shooting game that truly impressed me with realistic game feel and rich sound. The game surrounds you with its ambience so successfully that it would feel fantastic even without a VR headset, with VR it is awesome

reviews.review_title: Fun little arcade shooting range game
reviews.review_description: It's nothing new but has a lot of potential. The physics is fun, gunplay is quite good. I'm sure it will improve with the teased content coming up, looking forward to it!
The game is so fun, liked the game mechanics, we even had a little competition with our friends. In addition, It is very comfortable and no motion sickness.
